sys_remote_update_set.description: Incident Intelligence is an Automated Scoped application that auto tags your work
sys_remote_update_set.name: Incident Intelligence v1.1

sys_update_xml.name: sys_app_e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154

Intelligence </name><package_json/><package_resolver_version>1.0.0</package_resolver_version><private>false</private><restrict_table_access>false</restrict_table_access><runtime_access_tracking>permissive</runtime_access_tracking><scope>x_2064375_incide_0</scope><scoped_administration>false</scoped_administration><short_description>Auto-categorizes incidents using keyword intelligence and posts audit work notes</short_description><source>x_2064375_incide_0</source><store_correlation_id/><store_url/><subscription_entitlement/><sys_class_name>sys_app</sys_class_name><sys_code/><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 sys_update_xml.name: sys_scope_privilege_571840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e4
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_scope_privilege"><sys_scope_privilege action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><operation>write</operation><source_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</source_scope><status>allowed</status><sys_class_name>sys_scope_privilege</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:16:06</sys_created_on><sys_id>571840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>incident</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_scope_privilege_571840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:16:06</sys_updated_on><target_name>incident</target_name><target_scope display_value="Global">global</target_scope><target_type>sys_db_object</target_type></sys_scope_privilege></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_71fef308c37d03d013481cedd40131d5
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="DELETE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>IncidentTagger</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[var IncidentTagger = Class.create();

IncidentTagger.prototype = {

    initialize: function() {
        // Keyword map: each entry defines keywords, and the resulting
        // category, subcategory, and assignment group.
        // Ordered from most specific to least specific.
        this.mappings = [
            {
                keywords: ['vpn', 'remote access', 'cisco anyconnect', 'pulse secure', 'tunnel'],
                category: 'network',
                subcategory: 'vpn',
                assignment_group: 'Network Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['wifi', 'wireless', 'wi-fi', 'ssid', 'access point', 'no internet', 'internet down'],
                category: 'network',
                subcategory: 'wireless',
                assignment_group: 'Network Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['password', 'reset password', 'forgot password', 'locked out', 'account locked', 'cannot login', "can't login", 'login failed'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'account_management',
                assignment_group: 'IT Help Desk',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['outlook', 'email not working', 'cannot send email', "can't receive", 'mailbox', 'exchange'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'email',
                assignment_group: 'Messaging Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['laptop', 'computer slow', 'pc crash', 'blue screen', 'bsod', 'not turning on', 'keyboard', 'mouse', 'screen broken'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'desktop',
                assignment_group: 'Hardware Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['printer', 'print', 'scanner', 'printing issue', 'paper jam'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'printer',
                assignment_group: 'Hardware Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['software install', 'install application', 'license', 'software not working', 'application crash', 'app error'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'application',
                assignment_group: 'Software Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['server down', 'server error', 'database', 'service unavailable', '503', '502', 'timeout', 'outage'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'server',
                assignment_group: 'Infrastructure Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['access request', 'permission', 'unauthorized', 'access denied', 'forbidden', 'role'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'access',
                assignment_group: 'IT Help Desk',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['mobile', 'phone', 'iphone', 'android', 'teams app', 'mobile device'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'mobile',
                assignment_group: 'Mobile Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            }
        ];
    },

    /**
     * Main entry point. Call this from the Business Rule.
     * @param {string} shortDescription - The incident's short_description value
     * @returns {Object} result - {matched: bool, category, subcategory, assignment_group, confidence, matched_keywords}
     */
    classify: function(shortDescription) {
        if (!shortDescription) {
            return this._noMatch();
        }

        // Normalize: lowercase, trim, collapse multiple spaces
        var text = shortDescription.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');

        var bestMatch = null;
        var bestScore = 0;

        for (var i = 0; i < this.mappings.length; i++) {
            var mapping = this.mappings[i];
            var score = this._scoreMapping(text, mapping.keywords);

            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestMatch = mapping;
            }
        }

        // Require at least one keyword hit to classify
        if (bestScore === 0 || !bestMatch) {
            return this._noMatch();
        }

        return {
            matched: true,
            category: bestMatch.category,
            subcategory: bestMatch.subcategory,
            assignment_group: bestMatch.assignment_group,
            confidence: bestMatch.confidence,
            score: bestScore,
            matched_keywords: this._getMatchedKeywords(text, bestMatch.keywords)
        };
    },

    /**
     * Scores a mapping by counting how many of its keywords appear in the text.
     * Returns 0 if no keywords matched.
     */
    _scoreMapping: function(text, keywords) {
        var score = 0;
        for (var k = 0; k < keywords.length; k++) {
            if (text.indexOf(keywords[k]) !== -1) {
                score++;
            }
        }
        return score;
    },

    /**
     * Returns which specific keywords matched (for work note transparency).
     */
    _getMatchedKeywords: function(text, keywords) {
        var matched = [];
        for (var k = 0; k < keywords.length; k++) {
            if (text.indexOf(keywords[k]) !== -1) {
                matched.push(keywords[k]);
            }
        }
        return matched.join(', ');
    },

    _noMatch: function() {
        return {
            matched: false,
            category: '',
            subcategory: '',
            assignment_group: '',
            confidence: 'none',
            score: 0,
            matched_keywords: ''
        };
    },

    type: 'IncidentTagger'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 07:43:28</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>71fef308c37d03d013481cedd40131d5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IncidentTagger</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_71fef308c37d03d013481cedd40131d5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 07:48:04</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=71fef308c37d03d013481cedd40131d5"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_user_role_b15e7f84c37d03d013481cedd40131d2
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_user_role"><sys_user_role action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><assignable_by/><can_delegate>true</can_delegate><description>Default user role</description><elevated_privilege>false</elevated_privilege><federated_id/><grantable>true</grantable><includes_roles/><name>x_2064375_incide_0.user</name><scoped_admin>false</scoped_admin><suffix>user</suffix><sys_class_name>sys_user_role</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 07:33:24</sys_created_on><sys_id>b15e7f84c37d03d013481cedd40131d2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_2064375_incide_0.user</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_user_role_b15e7f84c37d03d013481cedd40131d2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 07:33:24</sys_updated_on></sys_user_role></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_scope_privilege_971840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e0
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_scope_privilege"><sys_scope_privilege action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><operation>execute</operation><source_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</source_scope><status>allowed</status><sys_class_name>sys_scope_privilege</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:16:06</sys_created_on><sys_id>971840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e0</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GlideRecord.update</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_scope_privilege_971840d8c3bd03d013481cedd40131e0</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:16:06</sys_updated_on><target_name>GlideRecord.update</target_name><target_scope display_value="Global">global</target_scope><target_type>scriptable</target_type></sys_scope_privilege></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_f3760454c3bd03d013481cedd4013127
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>IncidentTagger - Auto-Tag on Create</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    var defaultCategories = ['inquiry',  ''];
    var currentCategory = current.category.toString().toLowerCase();
    
    var userSetCategory = (currentCategory !== '' && 
                           defaultCategories.indexOf(currentCategory) === -1);
    
    if (userSetCategory) {
        gs.info('IncidentTagger: User set category manually, skipping.');
        return;
    }

    var tagger = new x_2064375_incide_0.IncidentTagger();
    var result = tagger.classify(current.short_description.toString());

    if (!result.matched) {
        gs.info('IncidentTagger: No classification match. Description: ' + 
                current.short_description);
        return;
    }

    current.category = result.category;
    current.subcategory = result.subcategory;

    var groupGR = new GlideRecord('sys_user_group');
    groupGR.addQuery('name', result.assignment_group);
    groupGR.setLimit(1);
    groupGR.query();

    if (groupGR.next()) {
        current.assignment_group = groupGR.sys_id;
    } else {
        gs.warn('IncidentTagger: Assignment group not found: ' + result.assignment_group);
    }

    gs.info('IncidentTagger: Classified as ' + result.category + '/' + 
            result.subcategory + ' | Group: ' + result.assignment_group);

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:10:32</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>f3760454c3bd03d013481cedd4013127</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IncidentTagger - Auto-Tag on Create</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_f3760454c3bd03d013481cedd4013127</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:35:35</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=f3760454c3bd03d013481cedd4013127"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_scope_privilege_cf1840d8c3bd03d013481cedd401317e
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_scope_privilege"><sys_scope_privilege action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><operation>read</operation><source_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</source_scope><status>allowed</status><sys_class_name>sys_scope_privilege</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:16:05</sys_created_on><sys_id>cf1840d8c3bd03d013481cedd401317e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>incident</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_scope_privilege_cf1840d8c3bd03d013481cedd401317e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:16:05</sys_updated_on><target_name>incident</target_name><target_scope display_value="Global">global</target_scope><target_type>sys_db_object</target_type></sys_scope_privilege></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_scope_privilege_071840d8c3bd03d013481cedd4013185
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_scope_privilege"><sys_scope_privilege action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><operation>execute</operation><source_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</source_scope><status>allowed</status><sys_class_name>sys_scope_privilege</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:16:05</sys_created_on><sys_id>071840d8c3bd03d013481cedd4013185</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GlideRecord.setWorkflow</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_scope_privilege_071840d8c3bd03d013481cedd4013185</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:16:05</sys_updated_on><target_name>GlideRecord.setWorkflow</target_name><target_scope display_value="Global">global</target_scope><target_type>scriptable</target_type></sys_scope_privilege></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_5755c054c3bd03d013481cedd401319c
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_2064375_incide_0.IncidentTagger</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>IncidentTagger</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var IncidentTagger = Class.create();

IncidentTagger.prototype = {

    initialize: function() {
        this.mappings = [
            {
                keywords: ['vpn', 'remote access', 'cisco anyconnect', 'pulse secure', 'tunnel'],
                category: 'network',
                subcategory: 'vpn',
                assignment_group: 'Network Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['wifi', 'wireless', 'wi-fi', 'ssid', 'access point', 'no internet', 'internet down'],
                category: 'network',
                subcategory: 'wireless',
                assignment_group: 'Network Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['password', 'reset password', 'forgot password', 'locked out', 'account locked', 'cannot login', "can't login", 'login failed'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'account_management',
                assignment_group: 'IT Help Desk',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['outlook', 'email not working', 'cannot send email', "can't receive", 'mailbox', 'exchange'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'email',
                assignment_group: 'Messaging Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['laptop', 'computer slow', 'pc crash', 'blue screen', 'bsod', 'not turning on', 'keyboard', 'mouse', 'screen broken'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'desktop',
                assignment_group: 'Hardware Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['printer', 'print', 'scanner', 'printing issue', 'paper jam'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'printer',
                assignment_group: 'Hardware Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['software install', 'install application', 'license', 'software not working', 'application crash', 'app error'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'application',
                assignment_group: 'Software Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['server down', 'server error', 'database', 'service unavailable', '503', '502', 'timeout', 'outage'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'server',
                assignment_group: 'Infrastructure Support',
                confidence: 'high'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['access request', 'permission', 'unauthorized', 'access denied', 'forbidden', 'role'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'access',
                assignment_group: 'IT Help Desk',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['mobile', 'phone', 'iphone', 'android', 'teams app', 'mobile device'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'mobile',
                assignment_group: 'Mobile Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['teams', 'microsoft teams', 'video call', 'meeting', 'collaboration'],
                category: 'software',
                subcategory: 'collaboration',
                assignment_group: 'Software Support',
                confidence: 'medium'
            },
            {
                keywords: ['slow', 'performance', 'lagging', 'freezing', 'unresponsive'],
                category: 'hardware',
                subcategory: 'performance',
                assignment_group: 'Hardware Support',
                confidence: 'low'
            }
        ];
    },

    classify: function(shortDescription) {
        if (!shortDescription) {
            return this._noMatch();
        }

        var text = shortDescription.toLowerCase().trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');

        var bestMatch = null;
        var bestScore = 0;

        for (var i = 0; i < this.mappings.length; i++) {
            var mapping = this.mappings[i];
            var score = this._scoreMapping(text, mapping.keywords);

            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestMatch = mapping;
            }
        }

        if (bestScore === 0 || !bestMatch) {
            return this._noMatch();
        }

        return {
            matched: true,
            category: bestMatch.category,
            subcategory: bestMatch.subcategory,
            assignment_group: bestMatch.assignment_group,
            confidence: bestMatch.confidence,
            score: bestScore,
            matched_keywords: this._getMatchedKeywords(text, bestMatch.keywords)
        };
    },

    _scoreMapping: function(text, keywords) {
        var score = 0;
        for (var k = 0; k < keywords.length; k++) {
            if (text.indexOf(keywords[k]) !== -1) {
                score++;
            }
        }
        return score;
    },

    _getMatchedKeywords: function(text, keywords) {
        var matched = [];
        for (var k = 0; k < keywords.length; k++) {
            if (text.indexOf(keywords[k]) !== -1) {
                matched.push(keywords[k]);
            }
        }
        return matched.join(', ');
    },

    _noMatch: function() {
        return {
            matched: false,
            category: '',
            subcategory: '',
            assignment_group: '',
            confidence: 'none',
            score: 0,
            matched_keywords: ''
        };
    },

    type: 'IncidentTagger'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:05:06</sys_created_on><sys_id>5755c054c3bd03d013481cedd401319c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IncidentTagger</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_5755c054c3bd03d013481cedd401319c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:05:06</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_scope_privilege_2f1d4c14c3fd03d013481cedd401319e
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_scope_privilege"><sys_scope_privilege action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><operation>read</operation><source_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</source_scope><status>allowed</status><sys_class_name>sys_scope_privilege</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:37:58</sys_created_on><sys_id>2f1d4c14c3fd03d013481cedd401319e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>sys_user_group</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_scope_privilege_2f1d4c14c3fd03d013481cedd401319e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 08:37:58</sys_updated_on><target_name>sys_user_group</target_name><target_scope display_value="Global">global</target_scope><target_type>sys_db_object</target_type></sys_scope_privilege></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_user_role_995e7f84c37d03d013481cedd4013187
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_user_role"><sys_user_role action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><assignable_by/><can_delegate>true</can_delegate><description>Default admin role</description><elevated_privilege>false</elevated_privilege><federated_id/><grantable>true</grantable><includes_roles/><name>x_2064375_incide_0.admin</name><scoped_admin>false</scoped_admin><suffix>admin</suffix><sys_class_name>sys_user_role</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 07:33:23</sys_created_on><sys_id>995e7f84c37d03d013481cedd4013187</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>x_2064375_incide_0.admin</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_user_role_995e7f84c37d03d013481cedd4013187</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 07:33:23</sys_updated_on></sys_user_role></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_0d17c818c3bd03d013481cedd4013176
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>incident</collection><condition>current.category != '' && current.category != null</condition><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>IncidentTagger - Post Work Note</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    var tagger = new x_2064375_incide_0.IncidentTagger();
    var result = tagger.classify(current.short_description.toString());

    if (!result.matched) {
        return;
    }

    var workNote = [];
    workNote.push('[Incident Intelligence] Auto-Classification Applied');
    workNote.push('');
    workNote.push('Automatically categorized based on keyword analysis.');
    workNote.push('');
    workNote.push('Classification Details:');
    workNote.push('  Category         : ' + result.category);
    workNote.push('  Subcategory      : ' + result.subcategory);
    workNote.push('  Assignment Group : ' + result.assignment_group);
    workNote.push('  Confidence       : ' + result.confidence);
    workNote.push('  Matched Keywords : ' + result.matched_keywords);
    workNote.push('');
    workNote.push('If incorrect, update Category and Assignment Group manually.');

    var incGR = new GlideRecord('incident');
    if (incGR.get(current.sys_id)) {
        incGR.work_notes = workNote.join('\n');
        incGR.update();
    }

    gs.info('IncidentTagger: Work note posted on ' + current.number);

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-26 08:12:43</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>0d17c818c3bd03d013481cedd4013176</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>IncidentTagger - Post Work Note</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Incident Intelligence " source="x_2064375_incide_0">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Incident Intelligence ">e45e3f84c37d03d013481cedd4013154</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_0d17c818c3bd03d013481cedd4013176</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-26 15:12:57</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=0d17c818c3bd03d013481cedd4013176"/></record_update>
